title: compaction-optimizer settings
description: Schema for extensionSettings.compactionOptimizer.* in ~/.pi/agent/settings.json (user) and <cwd>/.pi/settings.json (project). Documentation-only — pi v0.75.5 does not run runtime schema validation. Numeric bounds below mirror the project-layer runtime clamps in lib/settings.ts (PROJECT_LAYER_CLAMPS); the user layer is not runtime-clamped but operators should treat these bounds as the recommended envelope. See ADR-0019 and #210.

mode.description: Summary generation mode. `hybrid` (default) runs the deterministic LLM-free builder when the conversation is tool-call-dense and falls through to pi's LLM summarizer otherwise. `deterministic` always runs the builder (drops /compact custom instructions with a warning). `llm-only-with-dump` never runs the builder — pi's default summarizer + archive only.

previousSummaryMaxChars.description: Cap on chars of the prior summary re-inlined into the deterministic builder's Carried-Forward Context section. 0 omits the section entirely; the full prior summary always remains in the archive. Bounds geometric growth across compactions (#253).

maxReadFiles.description: Cap on the size of preparation.fileOps.read after pruning. Excess entries are evicted in insertion order, keeping the most recent N. modifiedFiles is never pruned.

staleAfterCompactions.description: Reserved for future use; PR1 does not surface per-file age, so this key is informational only.

dropPatterns.description: Regex patterns; matching paths are dropped from fileOps.read before the cap is applied. modifiedFiles is unaffected. User layer only — project-layer values are rejected with a notify warning (regex ReDoS surface; see ADR-0019 Threat Model).

path.description: Absolute or ~-rooted directory where per-session archives are written. User layer only — project-layer values are rejected with a notify warning per ADR-0019 Threat Model.

ephemeralBehavior.description: Behavior for sessions where sessionManager.isPersisted() === false. 'tmp' uses mkdtemp under $TMPDIR with mode 0o700, swept after 24h. User layer only.

redactPatterns.description: Regex patterns applied to archive content before write; matches replaced with [REDACTED]. Best-effort: each pattern runs under a 250ms wall-clock budget. User layer only.
